title: Student Performance Analysis Dashboard
description: An interactive dashboard to analyze student performance and attendance, built with Power BI on top of a cleaned academic dataset.
features: Power Query used for data cleaning and shaping
DAX measures for key academic metrics
Interactive charts, KPI cards, and slicers for effective data visualization

title: AI-Based Smart Learning & Automated Evaluation System
description: An AI-assisted learning platform that personalizes learning paths and automates evaluation and feedback for students.

title: Fitness Tracker
description: A full-stack fitness tracking web application built on the MERN stack that lets users log workouts and monitor progress.
features: Set fitness goals and monitor progress over time
MongoDB for data storage, Node.js + Express.js for the backend
